languages.text: {n}Окинув вас задумчивым взглядом, Ризза осторожно отвечает:{/n} "Речь ведь идет о вещах более значительных, чем партия лазвинтовок или трюм обскуры? В данный момент мне нечего вам предложить, но я запомню, что вы интересовались, и сообщу об этом своим партнерам".

traits.locale_text: {n}Окинув вас задумчивым взглядом, Ризза осторожно отвечает:{/n} "Речь ведь идет о вещах более значительных, чем партия лазвинтовок или трюм обскуры? В данный момент мне нечего вам предложить, но я запомню, что вы интересовались, и сообщу об этом своим партнерам".

languages.text: {n}Ryzza gives you a calculating look and says tentatively,{/n} "I take it we're talking about something more substantial than a shipment of lasguns or a hold packed with obscura? I can't offer you anything at the moment, but I'll remember that you asked. I'll let my associates know."

I can't offer you anything at the moment, but I'll remember that you asked. I'll let my partners know."

{n}Ryzza gives you a calculating look and says tentatively,{/n} "I take it we're talking about something more substantial than a shipment of lasguns or a hold packed with obscura? I can't offer you anything at the moment, but I'll remember that you asked. I'll let my associates know."

languages.text: {n}Ryzza vous lance un regard calculateur et répond sur un ton prudent :{/n} « Plus ambitieuses qu'une cargaison de fusils laser ou qu'une cale remplie d'obscura, je suppose ? Je n'ai rien à vous proposer pour le moment, mais j'en prends bonne note et j'en parlerai à mes associés. »
languages.original_text: {n}Ryzza gives you a calculating look and says tentatively,{/n} "I take it we're talking about something more substantial than a shipment of lasguns or a hold packed with obscura? I can't offer you anything at the moment, but I'll remember that you asked. I'll let my associates know."

traits.locale_text: {n}Ryzza vous lance un regard calculateur et répond sur un ton prudent :{/n} « Plus ambitieuses qu'une cargaison de fusils laser ou qu'une cale remplie d'obscura, je suppose ? Je n'ai rien à vous proposer pour le moment, mais j'en prends bonne note et j'en parlerai à mes associés. »

languages.text: {n}Ryzza wirft Ihnen einen berechnenden Blick zu und sagt zögernd{/n}: "Ich nehme an, wir reden über etwas Wesentlicheres als eine Ladung Laserwaffen oder einen Laderaum voller Obscura? Ich kann euch im Moment nichts anbieten, aber ich werde mir merken, dass ihr danach gefragt habt. Ich werde meinen Mitarbeitern Bescheid geben."
languages.original_text: {n}Ryzza gives you a calculating look and says tentatively,{/n} "I take it we're talking about something more substantial than a shipment of lasguns or a hold packed with obscura? I can't offer you anything at the moment, but I'll remember that you asked. I'll let my associates know."

traits.locale_text: {n}Ryzza wirft Ihnen einen berechnenden Blick zu und sagt zögernd{/n}: "Ich nehme an, wir reden über etwas Wesentlicheres als eine Ladung Laserwaffen oder einen Laderaum voller Obscura? Ich kann euch im Moment nichts anbieten, aber ich werde mir merken, dass ihr danach gefragt habt. Ich werde meinen Mitarbeitern Bescheid geben."

languages.text: {n}Ryzza te lanza una mirada calculadora y dice tímidamente{/n}: "¿Supongo que estamos hablando de algo más sustancial que un cargamento de pistolas láser o una bodega repleta de obscuras? De momento no puedo ofrecerte nada, pero recordaré que me lo has pedido. Se lo haré saber a mis socios".
languages.original_text: {n}Ryzza gives you a calculating look and says tentatively,{/n} "I take it we're talking about something more substantial than a shipment of lasguns or a hold packed with obscura? I can't offer you anything at the moment, but I'll remember that you asked. I'll let my associates know."

traits.locale_text: {n}Ryzza te lanza una mirada calculadora y dice tímidamente{/n}: "¿Supongo que estamos hablando de algo más sustancial que un cargamento de pistolas láser o una bodega repleta de obscuras? De momento no puedo ofrecerte nada, pero recordaré que me lo has pedido. Se lo haré saber a mis socios".

languages.text: {n}Ryzza size hesaplı bir bakış atıyor ve çekingen bir tavırla şöyle diyor:{/n} "Sanırım bir lazer silahı sevkiyatından ya da obscura dolu bir ambardan daha önemli bir şeyden bahsediyoruz? Şu anda size bir şey teklif edemem ama sorduğunuzu hatırlayacağım. İş arkadaşlarıma haber veririm."
languages.original_text: {n}Ryzza gives you a calculating look and says tentatively,{/n} "I take it we're talking about something more substantial than a shipment of lasguns or a hold packed with obscura? I can't offer you anything at the moment, but I'll remember that you asked. I'll let my associates know."
